nf/quick-369-implement-project-level-for.task_description: Implement project-level formal spec discovery via convention-based manifest
nf/quick-369-implement-project-level-for.approach: Implement convention-based manifest discovery that auto-detects and registers formal specification files in .planning/formal/ directory without requiring manual configuration.
out_of_scope: Migrating existing formal specification files to new directory structure
Creating validation rules or enforcement gates for discovered specs
Implementing spec file synchronization across multiple projects
Building a UI dashboard for spec manifest visualization
Generating formal specifications from code analysis
nf/quick-369-implement-project-level-for.risk_reason: Task involves creating and modifying formal verification files and updating formal scope discovery/execution scripts
